# GeoScore — Free SEO & AI Visibility Audit Tool

> GeoScore is a free, instant, no-login SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) audit tool for any website worldwide. Enter any domain to receive a full technical SEO audit, AI citation prediction, schema analysis, keyword research, domain authority check, and step-by-step AI-generated fix guides — all in under 60 seconds.

## What GeoScore Does

GeoScore audits websites across 6 parallel modules:

1. **Technical SEO** — robots.txt, sitemap.xml, llms.txt, HTTPS, response time, meta tags, canonical URL, Open Graph, H1 count, hreflang, noindex detection, security headers (HSTS/CSP/X-Frame-Options), technology stack detection (CMS, analytics, frameworks, CDN, chat widgets).

2. **Schema Markup** — validates JSON-LD structured data: LocalBusiness, Organization, FAQPage, Article, Product, BreadcrumbList, Event, Review, HowTo, VideoObject.

3. **Content Quality** — word count, H2 structure, image alt text coverage, phone/address detection, readability scoring.

4. **Domain Authority** — Wikipedia presence (Wikipedia REST API), Wikidata entity lookup (SPARQL), domain age (Wayback Machine CDX API), backlink sample count.

5. **GEO / AI Citation Prediction** — predicts whether AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overview) would cite this business. Uses Meta Llama 3.1-8B on Cloudflare Workers AI to evaluate 3 realistic search queries per business.

6. **Keyword Research** — vertical-specific keywords from Google Autocomplete (free, no key), classified by intent (transactional/commercial/informational/local) and flagged for AI answer potential.

## Additional Features

- **AI Chat**: Ask questions about any audit result in natural language. Powered by Meta Llama 3.3-70B-Instruct-FP8.
- **Streaming Fix Guides**: Per-recommendation step-by-step fix instructions generated by AI, streamed token-by-token.
- **Semantic Search**: In-browser BGE-Small-EN-v1.5 model (WebGPU) for domain suggestion search.
- **Score System**: SEO Score (technical 40% + schema 30% + content 30%), GEO Score (authority 50% + citation rate 50%), Overall Score (SEO 55% + GEO 45%).

## Free Tools & APIs Used

- Cloudflare Workers AI (Meta Llama 3.1-8B, Meta Llama 3.3-70B-FP8) — AI analysis, summaries, chat, fix guides
- Google Autocomplete API (suggestqueries.google.com) — keyword research, no API key
- Wikipedia REST API (en.wikipedia.org/api/rest_v1) — brand authority signal
- Wikidata SPARQL (query.wikidata.org/sparql) — entity identification
- Wayback Machine CDX API (web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx) — domain age
- HuggingFace Transformers.js + BGE-Small-EN-v1.5 — in-browser semantic search

## Infrastructure

- Runtime: Cloudflare Workers (edge compute, 100K req/day free)
- Database: Cloudflare D1 SQLite (5M rows free)
- Cache: Cloudflare KV (100K reads/day free, 1-hour audit TTL)
- AI: Cloudflare Workers AI (10K neurons/day free)
- Frontend: Cloudflare Pages (unlimited bandwidth free)

## Pricing

GeoScore is completely free. No account, no login, no credit card, no API keys needed.

## URL

https://geoscoreapp.pages.dev
